name: bug
description: Something is broken or behaves incorrectly

name: enhancement
description: New feature, workflow improvement, or product enhancement

name: documentation
description: Documentation, manuals, reference library, or README work

name: security
description: Security, isolation, auth, permissions, or secret-handling work

name: frontend
description: Frontend UI, UX, layout, or browser interaction

name: runner
description: Code execution, containers, PTY, runtime, or sandboxing

name: curriculum
description: Courses, assessments, certificates, and learning workflows

name: offline-docs
description: Offline documentation, reference packs, mirrors, and search

name: distributed-worker
description: Remote workers, dispatch, topology, and distributed execution

name: admin-ui
description: Administration panel, settings, roles, and management flows

name: ai-mentor
description: LM Studio, AI help, mentor flows, and prompt behavior

name: priority:high
description: High-priority work with strong delivery impact

name: release:blocker
description: Must be resolved before the next planned release

name: needs:repro
description: Needs a reliable reproduction or narrower failure scope
